creator: ek@purplehat.org
text:
Created attachment 260005
NEW SNIP v1.1.0 patch

(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #32)

Hello, Mahhamad. Thanks for the info. Please find new patch attached.

1. DISTVERSIONPREFIX added
2. Port checked with portclippy/portfmt/portlint -abct (no errors)
3. OPTIONS DESC removed (where they could be)
4. OPTIONSNG used instead of the conditionals
5. Dynamic PLIST used instead of static

Please let me know if there's anything else that needs to be done.
